channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Intermittent fasting leads to unexpected brain changes
item.description: A study on obese adults found that intermittent fasting may rewire both the gut and brain, aiding weight loss.

item.title: Ancient DNA shows women's key role in transforming prehistoric Europe
item.description: New DNA evidence reveals closer interactions between hunter-gatherers and early farmers than previously thought, with women likely playing a central role.

item.title: Caffeine reversed memory issues from lack of sleep
item.description: Sleep deprivation harms a brain circuit for social memory, but caffeine may reverse the effect, researchers found.

item.title: New phase of matter may advance quantum technology
item.description: Using custom silver nanoparticles stacked like LEGO bricks, scientists stabilized a previously unseen crystal phase.
